prestazioni: Upgrade the Toyota-sourced 2GR-FE 3.5L V6 (engine code: 2GR-FE) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12psi boost, 450hp at the wheels) paired with a custom Lotus-specific ECU remap by Dyno Dynamics Australia, utilizing a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition control under forced induction.

Install a full titanium exhaust system by Hayward & Scott, featuring 3.5-inch mandrel-bent downpipes, a 304 stainless steel center section with X-pipe crossover, and dual 4.5-inch titanium tips, reducing weight by 18kg while optimizing scavenging for the 2GR-FE’s 60-degree V6 architecture.

Replace the OEM Lotus AP Racing CP5356 front and CP5357 rear brake calipers with a full Alcon Monobloc 6-piston front (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear (350mm discs) big brake kit, including custom Lotus-specific aluminum hats and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track-optimized fade resistance.
estetica: Fit a full carbon fiber widebody kit by Vorsteiner, including front fenders with integrated cooling ducts, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares (adding 50mm per side), and a custom 3D-scanned carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust cutouts for the Hayward & Scott system.

Replace the OEM Lotus Evora headlights with a custom LED projector setup by LUX Automotive, featuring CREE XHP70.2 emitters, sequential turn signals, and a DRL signature inspired by the Lotus Emira, all housed in a CNC-machined billet aluminum housing with a clear polycarbonate lens.

Install a full Ohlins TTX40 coilover suspension system with Lotus-specific valving, adjustable camber plates (front: -3.5° to -1.5°, rear: -2.8° to -1.0°), and custom spring rates (front: 18kg/mm, rear: 22kg/mm) paired with a set of 19x9.5 ET35 (front) and 20x11 ET50 (rear) forged aluminum wheels by BBS FI-R, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35 R19 front, 305/30 R20 rear).
